options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: tape_requirement
options.description:
Cassette Tape items are obtained by clearing unique songs. 
The specified amount must be collected before your goal song can unlock. 
A goal of 18 requires you to play every song in the game.

options.name: teatime_tokens
options.description:
How many (if any) Teatime Tokens to include in the item pool.
These must be collected before your goal song can unlock. 
This may be in addition to, or instead of, Cassette Tapes.

options.name: token_percentage
options.description: If Teatime Tokens are enabled, what percentage of them must be collected before your goal song can unlock.

options.name: full_band_goal
options.description: If this option is enabled then you must clear your goal song with every character in order to complete your seed.

options.name: matching_outfits_goal
options.description:
If this option is enabled then all band members must be wearing a matching outfit before your goal song can unlock.
Only the main outfit is relevant; hairstyles and accessories are not considered.
Please be aware that after equipping the correct outfits, you may need to leave the song screen and then re-enter it in order for the goal song to correctly appear.

options.name: challenge_locations
options.description: Include locations for clearing songs with A ranks and high combos.

options.name: hard_clear_locations
options.description: Include locations for clearing songs on Hard difficulty mode.

options.name: hard_challenge_locations
options.description: Include locations for clearing songs with A ranks and high combos on Hard difficulty mode.

options.name: shuffle_hard_difficulty
options.description: Adds a Hard Difficulty item that must be obtained before songs can be played on Hard difficulty mode.

options.name: event_locations
options.description: Include additional locations for triggering story events.

options.name: starting_songs_amount
options.description: How many songs to begin the game with.

options.name: starting_characters_amount
options.description: How many playable characters to begin the game with.

options.name: snack_upgrades
options.description:
How many Snack Upgrade items to include in the item pool. 
When collected, these permanently extend the duration of in-game Snack effects.
These make the game progressively easier as more are collected.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
